title: Department Manager Vacancy at V-Mart Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at V-Mart Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!
